modules.module_title: Hand Block Printing - Advanced Techniques & Materials

questions.question: Textile printing ka primary purpose kya hai?

options.B: Fabric par design ya pattern apply karna

questions.explanation: Textile printing ka mukhya uddeshya fabric ki surface par rangon aur patterns ko apply karke use attractive banana hai.

questions.question: Printing ke liye kaun sa fabric type generally sabse accha mana jata hai?

options.B: Cotton

questions.explanation: Cotton fabric printing ke liye sabse popular aur versatile hai kyunki yeh dyes ko acchi tarah absorb karta hai aur easy to handle hota hai.

questions.question: Workplace safety ke liye sabse pehle kya karna chahiye?

options.B: Personal Protective Equipment (PPE) pehenna

questions.explanation: Kisi bhi printing unit mein safety ke liye sabse pehle PPE jaise gloves, apron, masks pehenna zaroori hai.

questions.question: Fabric ko print karne se pehle 'scouring' kyu kiya jata hai?

options.A: Fabric ko soft banane ke liye
options.B: Fabric se impurities jaise oils aur waxes hatane ke liye
options.C: Fabric ko shrink hone se rokne ke liye
options.D: Fabric ko shine dene ke liye

questions.explanation: Scouring se fabric se natural impurities aur sizing agents remove ho jaate hain, jisse dye absorption better hota hai.

questions.question: Kaun sa chemical printing mein 'fixation' ke liye use hota hai?

options.B: Salt

questions.explanation: Binder printing paste ka ek important component hai jo pigment ko fabric ke saath fix karta hai, jisse wash fastness badhti hai.

questions.question: Agar aapko chemical splash ho jaye, toh sabse pehla step kya hoga?

options.B: Affected area ko turant paani se dho lein

questions.explanation: Chemical splash hone par turant affected area ko running water se dho lena chahiye taki chemical ka effect kam ho.

questions.question: Textile printing mein 'repeat' ka kya matlab hai?

options.A: Ek hi colour ko baar-baar use karna
options.B: Design ka woh hissa jo baar-baar print hota hai

questions.explanation: Repeat ek design unit hoti hai jo fabric par continuously print hoti hai, ek seamless pattern banane ke liye.

questions.question: Printing table par fabric ko smooth aur wrinkle-free rakhne ke liye kya use karte hain?

options.B: Tape

questions.explanation: Printing table par fabric ko fix karne ke liye ek mild adhesive ya gum use kiya jata hai, jisse fabric apni jagah par rahe aur creases na pade.

questions.question: 'Curing' process ka printing mein kya role hai?

options.A: Ink ko dry karna aur fabric par fix karna
options.B: Fabric ko soft banana

questions.explanation: Curing ek heat treatment process hai jo printed ink ko fabric par permanent fix karta hai, jisse wash fastness aur durability badhti hai.

questions.question: Printing karte waqt acchi ventilation kyu zaroori hai?

options.A: Machinery ko cool rakhne ke liye
options.B: Colors ko bright rakhne ke liye
options.C: Harmful fumes ko bahar nikalne ke liye
options.D: Fabric ko jaldi dry karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Printing inks aur chemicals se nikalne wale fumes harmful ho sakte hain, isliye acchi ventilation personal health aur safety ke liye important hai.

questions.question: Kaun sa term ek printed design ki clarity aur sharpness ko describe karta hai?

options.B: Saturation

questions.explanation: Definition ya sharpness ek printed design ki detailing aur edges ki clarity ko refer karti hai. High definition matlab sharp aur clear print.

questions.question: Printing paste ki viscosity ko adjust karne ke liye kya add kiya jata hai?

options.B: Binder

questions.explanation: Thickener printing paste ko sahi consistency deta hai, jisse woh block ya screen se evenly transfer ho sake aur bleed na kare.

questions.question: Fabric par design transfer karne ke liye kaun se do main methods hain jo hum is course mein padhenge?

options.B: Dyeing aur Weaving
options.C: Hand Block Printing aur Screen Printing

questions.explanation: Iss course mein hum Hand Block Printing aur Screen Printing ki techniques seekhenge, jo textile printing ke do popular methods hain.

questions.question: Printing mein 'registration' ka kya matlab hai?

options.A: Fabric ko table par fix karna
options.B: Multiple colours ko sahi jagah par align karna

questions.explanation: Registration ka matlab hai multiple colours ya design elements ko ek doosre ke upar accurately align karna taki final design perfect bane.

questions.question: Agar printing area mein chemical spills ho jaye, toh kya karna chahiye?

options.B: Turant absorbent material se saaf karna chahiye aur dispose karna chahiye
options.D: Kisi aur ke saaf karne ka wait karna chahiye

questions.explanation: Chemical spills ko turant saaf karna chahiye, proper absorbent materials ka use karke, taki accidents aur contamination se bacha ja sake.

questions.question: Ek acchi printing paste mein kaun si property honi chahiye?

options.B: Bahut zyada thick

questions.explanation: Ek acchi printing paste ki viscosity smooth aur consistent honi chahiye, jisse woh evenly apply ho aur design mein sharpness aaye.

questions.question: Hand block printing mein blocks kis material se banaye jaate hain?

options.B: Plastic

questions.explanation: Traditional hand block printing mein blocks lakdi (wood) se banaye jaate hain, jin par design carve kiya jata hai.

questions.question: Block printing mein ink ko block par apply karne ke liye kya use karte hain?

options.B: Sponge

questions.explanation: Ink ko evenly block par apply karne ke liye ek padded tray ya sieve use kiya jata hai, jismein color spread hota hai.

questions.question: Hand block printing mein 'dabbing' ka kya matlab hai?

options.A: Block ko fabric par lightly press karna
options.B: Block ko fabric par rub karna

questions.explanation: Dabbing ka matlab hai block ko fabric par carefully aur evenly press karna taki design acchi tarah transfer ho.

questions.question: Kaun sa fabric hand block printing ke liye sabse zyada suitable hai?

options.B: Georgette

questions.explanation: Cotton fabric apni absorbent nature aur stable surface ke karan hand block printing ke liye ideal hai.

questions.question: Block printing mein 'registration marks' ka kya use hai?

options.B: Design ko correct position par align karna

questions.explanation: Registration marks multiple colour designs mein blocks ko sahi jagah par place karne aur pattern ko align karne mein help karte hain.

questions.question: Block ko clean karne ke liye sabse accha method kya hai?

options.B: Turant paani se dho kar soft brush se saaf karna

questions.explanation: Blocks ko turant paani se dho kar soft brush se saaf karna chahiye taki ink dry na ho aur blocks damage na ho.

questions.question: Agar block printing mein design 'bleed' ho raha hai, toh iska kya karan ho sakta hai?

options.B: Ink bahut zyada runny hai

questions.explanation: Agar ink bahut zyada runny (patli) hogi, toh woh fabric mein fail jayegi aur design bleed ho jayega. Viscosity ko adjust karna zaroori hai.

questions.question: Block printing ke liye kaun se dyes commonly use hote hain?

options.B: Reactive Dyes aur Pigment Inks

questions.explanation: Reactive dyes natural fibers ke liye acche hote hain, aur pigment inks versatile hote hain aur binder ke saath fix hote hain.

questions.question: Block printing mein 'padding' ka kya role hai?

options.B: Block ko cushion provide karna aur even pressure apply karne mein help karna

questions.explanation: Printing table par padding (felt ya foam) block ko cushion provide karti hai, jisse block par evenly pressure apply hota hai aur clear impression aata hai.

questions.question: Hand block printing mein ek single colour design print karne ke liye kitne blocks ki zaroorat hoti hai?

options.B: One

questions.explanation: Ek single colour design ke liye sirf ek block ki zaroorat hoti hai, jismein woh design carve kiya gaya ho.

questions.question: Block printing mein 'motif' kya hota hai?

options.B: Ek chhota, repeating design element

questions.explanation: Motif ek chhota, distinct design unit hai jo block par carve kiya jata hai aur repeat hokar ek bada pattern banata hai.

questions.question: Agar block printing mein print uneven aa raha hai, toh kya problem ho sakti hai?

options.B: Block par uneven ink lagi hai ya pressure uneven hai

questions.explanation: Uneven print ka matlab hai ki ya toh block par ink evenly nahi lagi hai, ya phir fabric par pressure evenly apply nahi kiya gaya hai.

questions.question: Block printing mein fabric ko pre-wash kyu karte hain?

options.B: Usse shrink hone se bachane aur sizing agents hatane ke liye
options.C: Usse zyada absorbent banane ke liye

questions.explanation: Pre-washing se fabric ki sizing aur impurities nikal jaati hain, aur yeh shrink bhi ho jata hai, jisse printing ke baad shrinkage nahi hota.

questions.question: Hand block printing mein 'thappa' kisko kehte hain?

options.B: Wooden printing block ko

questions.explanation: Hindi mein, wooden printing block ko 'thappa' kehte hain, jo block printing ka mool upkaran hai.

questions.question: Block printing ke liye kaun sa wood sabse best mana jata hai?

options.B: Sheesham wood

questions.explanation: Mango wood block carving ke liye popular hai kyunki yeh soft hota hai carving ke liye, phir bhi durable hota hai.

questions.question: Block par design trace karne ke liye kaun sa tool use hota hai?

options.B: Pencil

questions.explanation: Block par design ko carve karne se pehle, use pencil se trace kiya jata hai.

questions.question: Agar block printing mein ink transfer nahi ho rahi hai, toh kya reason ho sakta hai?

options.B: Ink bahut kam hai ya block par evenly spread nahi hai

questions.explanation: Ink transfer na hone ka matlab hai ki block par ya toh ink kam hai, ya phir evenly spread nahi hai, jisse fabric par impression nahi ban raha.

questions.question: Multi-colour block printing mein sabse pehle kaun sa colour print karte hain?

options.B: Lightest colour

questions.explanation: Multi-colour printing mein sabse pehle lightest colour print karte hain, aur phir gradually darker shades ki taraf badhte hain taaki colours mix na ho aur design clear rahe.

questions.question: 'Discharge printing' mein kya hota hai?

options.A: Fabric par naya colour add karte hain
options.B: Fabric ke dyed area se colour nikalte hain

questions.explanation: Discharge printing mein, ek chemical paste use karke pehle se dyed fabric ke kuch areas se colour remove kiya jata hai, jisse design banta hai.

questions.question: 'Resist printing' ka ek common example kya hai?

options.B: Batik printing

questions.explanation: Batik resist printing ka ek famous example hai jismein wax ko resist material ke roop mein use kiya jata hai.

questions.question: Block carving ke liye kaun sa tool use hota hai?

options.B: Gouges aur chisels

questions.explanation: Gouges aur chisels specially design kiye gaye tools hain jo wood blocks par designs carve karne ke liye use hote hain.

questions.question: Wood blocks ki long life ke liye unki care kaise karni chahiye?

options.B: Unhe regularly oil karna aur saaf rakhna chahiye
options.C: Unhe paani mein soak karna chahiye

questions.explanation: Blocks ko saaf rakhna, dry karna aur occasionally oil karna unki durability badhata hai aur cracks se bachata hai.

questions.question: Agar block printing mein fine details print karni ho, toh kaun sa block use karna chahiye?

options.B: Chhote aur finely carved blocks

questions.explanation: Fine details ke liye chhote aur intricately carved blocks use kiye jaate hain, jisse sharpness aur precision aati hai.

questions.question: Indigo printing kis type ki printing ka example hai?

options.B: Resist printing

questions.explanation: Indigo printing aksar resist techniques jaise Dabu printing ke saath ki jaati hai, jismein mud paste ko resist ke roop mein use karte hain.

questions.question: Textile printing mein 'gum arabic' ka kya use hai?

options.B: Thickener aur binder ke roop mein

questions.explanation: Gum arabic ek natural thickener aur binder hai jo printing pastes ko sahi consistency deta hai aur pigment ko fabric par fix karta hai.

questions.question: Ek accha block print artist banne ke liye kaun si quality sabse zaroori hai?

options.B: Patience aur precision

questions.explanation: Block printing ek detailed aur time-consuming process hai, jismein patience aur precision bahut zaroori hai accha result paane ke liye.

questions.question: Agar aapko fabric par ek bada continuous pattern print karna hai, toh aap kya karenge?

options.A: Ek hi block ko baar-baar use karenge
options.B: Har baar naya block banayenge
options.D: Sirf ek chhota design print karenge

questions.explanation: Continuous pattern ke liye, ek hi block ko carefully align karke repeat karte hain, jisse seamless design banta hai.

questions.question: Block printing mein 'overlaying' ka kya matlab hai?

options.A: Ek colour ko doosre colour ke upar print karna
options.B: Do blocks ko ek saath use karna

questions.explanation: Overlaying tab hota hai jab ek colour ko doosre colour ke upar print karte hain, jisse naya shade ya depth banti hai.

questions.question: Block printing mein 'kharad' kya hai?

options.B: Block carving ke liye use hone wala ek tool

questions.explanation: Kharad ek traditional tool hai jo block carving mein use hota hai, particularly fine details aur intricate designs banane ke liye.

questions.question: Agar aapko ek block print design mein shading effect dena hai, toh aap kya technique use kar sakte hain?

options.B: Multiple blocks ke saath gradated colours ya overlaying karna

questions.explanation: Shading effect ke liye, multiple blocks (jaise outline aur fill blocks) aur gradated colours ya careful overlaying techniques use ki jaati hain.

questions.question: Block printing ke baad fabric ko 'steaming' kyu karte hain?

options.A: Fabric ko soft banane ke liye
options.B: Dyes ko fix karne ke liye, especially reactive dyes
options.C: Fabric ko shrink karne ke liye
options.D: Design ko highlight karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Steaming ek fixation process hai jo reactive dyes ko fabric ke fibers mein permanently fix karta hai, jisse wash fastness badhti hai.

questions.question: Block printing mein 'jute' blocks ka use kaisa hota hai?

options.B: Rough texture aur bold patterns ke liye

questions.explanation: Jute blocks ya jute fabric se bane blocks ek rough, rustic texture dete hain aur bold, abstract patterns ke liye acche hote hain.

questions.question: Block printing ke liye best working surface kaun si hai?

options.B: Soft, cushioned aur flat surface

questions.explanation: Ek soft, cushioned aur flat surface (jaise padded printing table) evenly pressure apply karne aur clear prints paane ke liye zaroori hai.

questions.question: Agar aapko ek block print design mein 'distressed' ya 'vintage' look dena hai, toh aap kya kar sakte hain?

options.A: Naye aur perfect blocks use karein
options.B: Blocks ko slightly worn ya uneven banayein, aur light pressure use karein

questions.explanation: Distressed look ke liye, blocks ko intentionally thoda worn out rakha jata hai, aur printing mein light, uneven pressure use kiya jata hai.

questions.question: Screen printing mein ink ko screen ke through fabric par push karne ke liye kya use hota hai?

options.B: Squeegee

questions.explanation: Squeegee ek rubber blade hai jo screen printing mein ink ko screen ke mesh se push karke fabric par transfer karta hai.

questions.question: Screen printing mein screen kis material se bani hoti hai?

options.B: Metal

questions.explanation: Screen printing mein screen ek frame par stretched fine mesh fabric (polyester ya silk) se bani hoti hai.

questions.question: Screen printing mein 'emulsion' ka kya role hai?

options.B: Screen par design stencil banana

questions.explanation: Emulsion screen par light-sensitive coating hoti hai, jisse exposure ke baad design ka stencil banta hai.

questions.question: Kaun sa ink type screen printing ke liye sabse common hai?

options.B: Oil-based ink

questions.explanation: Plastisol inks aur water-based inks screen printing mein sabse zyada use hote hain, alag-alag fabric types aur finish ke liye.

questions.question: Screen printing mein 'flash curing' kyu use hota hai?

options.B: Multi-colour printing mein ek colour ko doosre colour se pehle partially dry karne ke liye
options.C: Screen ko clean karne ke liye
options.D: Fabric ko shrink karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Flash curing ek intermediate drying process hai jo multi-colour printing mein ek colour ko partially dry karta hai, taki doosra colour uske upar print ho sake without smudging.

questions.question: Screen printing mein 'mesh count' ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Ek inch mein kitne threads hain
options.C: Kitni baar screen use hui hai

questions.explanation: Mesh count screen ke per inch threads ki sankhya hai, jo ink flow aur print detail ko affect karta hai.

questions.question: Agar screen printing mein ink 'clog' ho rahi hai, toh kya karan ho sakta hai?

options.B: Ink bahut jaldi dry ho rahi hai screen par

questions.explanation: Ink clogging ka matlab hai ki ink screen ke mesh mein dry ho rahi hai, jisse ink flow ruk jata hai. Iske liye ink ko re-wet karna ya retarder add karna pad sakta hai.

questions.question: Screen printing mein 'off-contact' kyu zaroori hai?

options.A: Ink ko zyada lagane ke liye
options.B: Screen ko fabric se thoda upar rakhne ke liye, clean print ke liye
options.C: Screen ko fabric se chipkane ke liye
options.D: Fabric ko stretch karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Off-contact screen ko fabric se thoda upar rakhta hai, jisse squeegee pass hone ke baad screen fabric se clean release ho, aur clean print mile.

questions.question: Screen printing mein 'scoop coater' ka kya use hai?

options.B: Screen par emulsion evenly apply karna

questions.explanation: Scoop coater ek tool hai jo screen par light-sensitive emulsion ko evenly aur consistently apply karta hai.

questions.question: Screen printing ke liye artwork kis format mein hona chahiye?

options.B: Vector format (e.g., AI, EPS) ya high-resolution bitmap

questions.explanation: Screen printing ke liye high quality, crisp artwork (vector ya high-res bitmap) zaroori hai taki stencil mein sharp edges aaye.

questions.question: Screen printing mein 'pinholes' kya hote hain?

options.B: Emulsion mein chhote, unwanted holes

questions.explanation: Pinholes emulsion mein chhote unwanted holes hote hain jo print mein unwanted dots ya spots create karte hain, aur unhe block karna padta hai.

questions.question: Screen ko 'degrease' kyu kiya jata hai?

options.B: Oil aur dust remove karne ke liye, jisse emulsion acchi tarah adhere kare

questions.explanation: Degreasing screen se oil, dust aur impurities hatata hai, jisse emulsion evenly lagti hai aur acchi tarah stick karti hai.

questions.question: Screen printing mein 'peel test' kyu kiya jata hai?

options.A: Ink ki colour brightness check karne ke liye
options.B: Ink ki adhesion aur durability check karne ke liye
options.C: Fabric ki quality check karne ke liye
options.D: Screen ki mesh count check karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Peel test printed ink ki adhesion aur durability ko check karta hai, jismein ink ko fabric se peel karne ki koshish ki jati hai.

questions.question: Screen printing setup mein 'platen' ka kya use hai?

options.B: Fabric ko flat aur stable rakhna printing ke liye

questions.explanation: Platen woh flat surface hai jis par fabric ko rakha jata hai printing ke dauran, jisse woh stable rahe.

questions.question: Agar screen printing mein print 'blurry' aa raha hai, toh kya karan ho sakta hai?

options.B: Off-contact sahi nahi hai ya squeegee pressure uneven hai

questions.explanation: Blurry print ka matlab hai ki ink fabric par fail rahi hai, jo usually incorrect off-contact, uneven squeegee pressure ya ink ki wrong viscosity ke karan hota hai.

questions.question: Screen printing mein 'flood bar' ka kya kaam hai?

options.B: Ink ko screen par evenly spread karna printing stroke se pehle

questions.explanation: Flood bar squeegee stroke se pehle ink ko screen par evenly spread karta hai, jisse agle print ke liye screen ready ho.

questions.question: Screen printing mein 'drying rack' kyu use hota hai?

options.A: Screens ko store karne ke liye
options.B: Printed garments ko dry karne ke liye
options.C: Inks ko store karne ke liye
options.D: Squeegees ko store karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Drying rack printed garments ko dry karne ke liye use hota hai, jisse woh ek doosre se touch na karein aur smudging se bachein.

questions.question: Multi-colour screen printing mein 'registration' kaise achieve karte hain?

options.B: Registration marks aur micro-adjustment knobs use karke
options.C: Har colour ke liye naya fabric use karke

questions.explanation: Multi-colour screen printing mein, registration marks aur printing press ke micro-adjustment knobs ka use karke har screen ko precisely align kiya jata hai.

questions.question: Photographic screen printing mein 'exposure unit' ka kya role hai?

options.B: Emulsion ko light se expose karke design ko harden karna

questions.explanation: Exposure unit light-sensitive emulsion ko UV light se expose karta hai, jisse design areas harden ho jaate hain aur non-design areas wash off ho jaate hain.

questions.question: Screen printing mein 'halftone' kya hota hai?

options.B: Ek single colour se shading aur tones create karne ki technique

questions.explanation: Halftone ek technique hai jismein dots ke alag-alag sizes aur spacing ka use karke ek single colour se shading aur tonal variations create ki jaati hain.

questions.question: Kaun sa ink type dark garments par vibrant print dene ke liye best hai?

options.B: Discharge ink

questions.explanation: Plastisol inks apni opacity ke karan dark garments par vibrant aur opaque prints dete hain.

questions.question: Screen printing mein 'underbase' kyu use hota hai?

options.A: Design ko chhota karne ke liye
options.B: Dark garments par colours ko pop out karne ke liye white ink ki pehli layer
options.C: Ink ko patla karne ke liye
options.D: Screen ko clean karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Underbase ek white ink ki layer hoti hai jo dark garments par colourful inks se pehle print ki jaati hai, jisse colours zyada vibrant aur opaque dikhe.

questions.question: Screen printing mein 'mesh tension' kyu important hai?

options.A: Screen ko light banane ke liye
options.B: Consistent print quality aur registration ke liye
options.C: Screen ko sasta banane ke liye
options.D: Screen ko jaldi dry karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Sahi mesh tension screen ko flat aur stable rakhti hai, jisse ink evenly transfer hoti hai aur print quality consistent rehti hai, especially multi-colour jobs mein.

questions.question: Agar screen printing mein ink fabric par 'ghosting' effect de rahi hai, toh kya problem ho sakti hai?

options.B: Screen fabric se jaldi release nahi ho rahi hai

questions.explanation: Ghosting tab hota hai jab screen fabric se clean release nahi hoti, jisse ink smudges ya faint duplicated image banti hai. Off-contact adjustment iska solution hai.

questions.question: Screen printing mein 'spot colour' ka kya matlab hai?

options.A: Ek chhota sa spot print karna
options.B: Har colour ko ek solid, pre-mixed colour ke roop mein print karna
options.D: Fabric par randomly spots create karna

questions.explanation: Spot colour printing mein, har colour ek specific, pre-mixed shade hota hai aur use alag screen se print kiya jata hai, jaise Pantone colours.

questions.question: Screen printing mein 'discharge additive' kis liye use hota hai?

options.A: Ink ko bright banane ke liye
options.B: Fabric ke colour ko remove karne ke liye, phir uski jagah naya colour print karna
options.C: Ink ko thick karne ke liye
options.D: Ink ko dry karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Discharge additive fabric ke original dye ko remove karta hai, jisse uski natural fibre color dikhti hai, aur phir us par naya pigment print kiya jata hai.

questions.question: Screen printing mein 'wet-on-wet' printing kya hai?

options.A: Ek colour ko dry hone se pehle doosra colour print karna
options.B: Sirf water-based inks use karna

questions.explanation: Wet-on-wet printing mein, ek colour ko poori tarah dry kiye bina hi doosra colour uske upar print kiya jata hai, jisse colours blend hote hain.

questions.question: Screen printing mein 'mesh count 110' ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Ek inch mein 110 threads hain
options.C: Screen 110 baar use ho chuki hai

questions.explanation: Mesh count 110 ka matlab hai ki screen ke ek linear inch mein 110 threads hain, jo ink flow aur detail level ko determine karta hai.

questions.question: Screen printing mein 'retarder' ka kya kaam hai?

options.B: Ink ko screen par dry hone se rokna

questions.explanation: Retarder ink mein add kiya jata hai taki woh screen par jaldi dry na ho aur clogging na ho.

questions.question: Screen printing mein 'capillary film' kyu use hota hai?

options.A: Screen ko clean karne ke liye
options.B: Direct emulsion ke alternative ke roop mein stencil banane ke liye
options.C: Ink ko mix karne ke liye
options.D: Fabric ko stretch karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Capillary film ek pre-sensitized emulsion film hai jo screen par apply ki jati hai stencil banane ke liye, especially fine details ke liye.

questions.question: Screen printing mein 'squeegee hardness' (durometer) ka kya impact hota hai?

options.B: Ink deposit ki thickness aur detail level

questions.explanation: Squeegee ki hardness ink deposit ki thickness aur detail level ko affect karti hai. Harder squeegee fine details aur thinner ink deposit deti hai.

questions.question: Screen printing mein 'heat press' ka kya use hai?

options.B: Printed ink ko final cure dena

questions.explanation: Heat press printed ink ko sahi temperature aur pressure par cure karta hai, jisse ink fabric par permanently fix ho jati hai.

questions.question: Agar screen printing mein ink 'strike-through' ho rahi hai (fabric ke doosri taraf ja rahi hai), toh kya karan ho sakta hai?

options.B: Ink bahut patli hai ya zyada pressure use hua hai

questions.explanation: Strike-through tab hota hai jab ink bahut patli hoti hai ya squeegee pressure bahut zyada hota hai, jisse ink fabric se pass hokar doosri taraf dikhti hai.

questions.question: Screen printing mein 'Pallet Adhesive' kyu use karte hain?

options.A: Screen ko pallet par chipkane ke liye
options.B: Fabric ko pallet par stable rakhne ke liye
options.C: Ink ko pallet par chipkane ke liye
options.D: Squeegee ko pallet par chipkane ke liye

questions.explanation: Pallet adhesive fabric ko printing pallet par securely hold karta hai, jisse printing ke dauran woh move na kare.

questions.question: Printed fabric ki 'wash fastness' check karne ke liye kya karte hain?

options.B: Usse baar-baar wash karte hain aur colour bleed check karte hain

questions.explanation: Wash fastness check karne ke liye printed fabric ko standard washing conditions mein wash karte hain aur dekhte hain ki colour kitna bleed ya fade hota hai.

questions.question: Printed garments ki 'hand feel' ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Fabric ki softness ya roughness

questions.explanation: Hand feel ek printed garment ki physical property hai jo batati hai ki woh touch karne par kaisa feel hota hai – soft, rough, rubbery, etc.

questions.question: Quality control mein 'misprint' ko kaise handle karte hain?

options.B: Usse reject karte hain ya rework karte hain, agar possible ho
options.C: Usse customer ko de dete hain
options.D: Usse doosre prints ke saath mix kar dete hain

questions.explanation: Misprints ko reject karna chahiye ya, agar possible ho, toh unhe rework karke sahi karna chahiye taki product quality maintain rahe.

questions.question: Printed fabric ko packaging se pehle 'iron' kyu karte hain?

options.B: Wrinkles remove karne aur finish dene ke liye
options.D: Usse zyada absorbent banane ke liye

questions.explanation: Ironing se printed fabric ke wrinkles remove ho jaate hain aur use ek professional aur neat finish milta hai.

questions.question: Cost estimation karte waqt kin factors ko consider karna chahiye?

options.B: Fabric cost, ink cost, labour cost, overheads

questions.explanation: Cost estimation mein fabric, ink, chemicals, labour, electricity, rent jaise sabhi expenses ko consider karna zaroori hai.

questions.question: Customer ko print ki care instructions kyu deni chahiye?

options.A: Customer ko confuse karne ke liye
options.B: Print ki durability aur look maintain rakhne ke liye
options.C: Zyada product sell karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Care instructions se customer ko pata chalta hai ki print ko kaise wash aur maintain karna hai, jisse uski life badhti hai.

questions.question: Small printing business ke liye 'branding' kyu important hai?

options.A: Sirf bade businesses ke liye zaroori hai
options.B: Customers ko attract karne aur pehchan banane ke liye
options.C: Product ko mehnga banane ke liye

questions.explanation: Branding ek small business ko market mein ek unique identity deti hai, jisse customers usse pehchan sakte hain aur attract hote hain.

questions.question: Sustainable printing practices mein kya include hota hai?

options.B: Eco-friendly inks aur minimal waste production

questions.explanation: Sustainable practices mein environment-friendly materials, waste reduction, aur energy efficiency shamil hain.

questions.question: Agar aapko bulk order milta hai, toh aapki pricing strategy kaisi honi chahiye?

options.A: Single piece rate se bhi zyada
options.B: Single piece rate se thoda kam ya discounted

questions.explanation: Bulk orders par generally discount diya jata hai, jisse customer attract hote hain aur business ko zyada volume milta hai.

questions.question: Customer feedback lena kyu zaroori hai?

options.B: Products aur services ko improve karne ke liye
options.D: Customer se dosti karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Customer feedback se aapko pata chalta hai ki aapke products aur services mein kya sudhar ki zaroorat hai.

questions.question: Printing business mein 'inventory management' ka kya matlab hai?

options.A: Sirf finished goods ko store karna
options.B: Raw materials, inks, blocks aur finished products ka stock track karna

questions.explanation: Inventory management mein raw materials, inks, blocks, aur finished products ke stock ko efficiently track aur manage karna shamil hai, taki na shortage ho na overstock.

questions.question: Printed fabric ko 'curing' ke baad kaun sa process follow hota hai?

options.B: Washing/finishing, then packaging

questions.explanation: Curing ke baad fabric ko wash kiya jata hai excess ink aur chemicals hatane ke liye, aur phir usse finish karke pack kiya jata hai.

questions.question: Agar aapko apne prints online sell karne hain, toh kya steps lenge?

options.B: High-quality photos, detailed product descriptions aur pricing ke saath e-commerce platform par list karenge

questions.explanation: Online selling ke liye high-quality visuals, clear descriptions, aur proper pricing ke saath ek reliable e-commerce platform zaroori hai.

questions.question: Printing business mein 'waste management' kyu important hai?

options.A: Sirf cost cut karne ke liye
options.B: Environmental impact kam karne aur costs control karne ke liye
options.C: Zyada waste create karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Waste management se environmental pollution kam hota hai aur raw material waste kam hone se operational costs bhi control mein rehte hain.

questions.question: Apne business ko grow karne ke liye aap marketing mein kya karenge?

options.B: Social media, local markets, word-of-mouth aur collaborations use karenge

questions.explanation: Effective marketing ke liye social media presence, local events mein participate karna, word-of-mouth referrals aur collaborations jaise multiple channels use karne chahiye.

questions.question: Ek printed garment ki final inspection mein kya check karna chahiye?

options.B: Print quality, alignment, colour accuracy, hand feel, aur koi defect

questions.explanation: Final inspection mein print quality (sharpness, coverage), colour accuracy, design alignment, hand feel, aur kisi bhi defect ko thoroughly check karna chahiye.
